parameters.query: INSERT INTO clients (email, name, product_name, amount_euros, stripe_session_id, next_action) VALUES ('{{ $json.email }}', '{{ $json.name }}', '{{ $json.product_name }}', {{ $json.amount_euros }}, '{{ $json.session_id }}', '{{ $json.next_action }}') ON CONFLICT (stripe_session_id) DO NOTHING
